CREATE TABLE test_single_value (x UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_single_value (x) VALUES (NULL), (7), (7), (NULL), (NULL);
SELECT singleValueOrNull(x) FROM test_single_value;
CREATE TABLE test_empty (x UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
SELECT singleValueOrNull(x) FROM test_empty;
CREATE TABLE test_multiple_values (x UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_multiple_values (x) VALUES (5), (10), (15), (10);
SELECT singleValueOrNull(x) FROM test_multiple_values;
CREATE TABLE test_single_value_subquery (id UInt8, value UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_single_value_subquery (id, value) VALUES (1, 5), (2, 5), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, singleValueOrNull(value) FROM test_single_value_subquery GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt8, value UInt8) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_join (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (1, 10), (1, 10), (2, 20), (2, NULL);
SELECT id, singleValueOrNull(value) FROM test_join GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_nested_subquery (x UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_nested_subquery (x) VALUES (10), (10), (NULL), (10);
SELECT singleValueOrNull((SELECT x FROM test_nested_subquery WHERE x IS NOT NULL));
CREATE TABLE test_combination (a UInt8, b UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_combination (a, b) VALUES (1, 2), (1, 2), (1, NULL), (2, 3);
SELECT singleValueOrNull(b) FROM test_combination WHERE a = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_cases (val UInt8 NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_cases (val) VALUES (NULL), (NULL), (20), (20), (30);
SELECT singleValueOrNull(val) FROM test_cases;
CREATE TABLE test_array (val Array(UInt8) NULL) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO test_array (val) VALUES (NULL), ([5]), ([5, 6]), ([5, 5]), ([6, 6]);
SELECT singleValueOrNull(val) FROM test_array;
